meta_title: For Founders: debugging with AI to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Build Your Portfolio as a Founder
content.seo_description: Stop waiting for clients. Use AI debugging to build a high-impact portfolio. Master Antigravity and Claude Code to ship SaaS features in record time.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of portfolio, stop building toy apps. Use AI-driven debugging to ship production-grade features in existing open-source projects. By leveraging Claude Code and Antigravity, you can resolve complex architectural bugs, document your contributions, and demonstrate high-level engineering proficiency to potential high-paying clients instantly.
content.intro:
The cold-start problem is the graveyard of aspiring founders. You have the vision and the drive, but without a track record, the market treats you like a ghost. Clients don't buy promises; they buy proof. The gap between where you are and where you need to be isn't a lack of talent—it's a lack of shipping velocity.

This is where AI-assisted debugging becomes your secret weapon. By using advanced tooling, you can surgically insert yourself into complex codebases, resolve critical technical debt, and transform 'no portfolio' into a showcase of high-stakes problem solving. We are moving beyond simple code generation; we are architecting your reputation through precision engineering.

steps.title: Target High-Value Repositories
steps.description: Identify open-source SaaS tools that align with your target niche. Select one with open issues that require deep architectural understanding rather than simple UI fixes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase and identify three critical bugs in the authentication or payment flows that, if fixed, would demonstrate high-level system design proficiency.

steps.title: Isolate the Root Cause
steps.description: Use Claude Code to trace the execution path of the bug. Don't just patch the symptom; find the architectural flaw that caused the regression.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a causal analysis on this bug. Map the dependency chain and explain how this failure propagates through the system.

steps.title: Draft the Architecture Fix
steps.description: Propose a solution that adheres to the project's existing design patterns. This demonstrates you can read and respect production-grade codebases.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a refactor plan for this module that resolves the current bug while improving testability and performance metrics by at least 20%.

steps.title: Execute and Validate
steps.description: Implement the fix using AI-assisted pair programming. Ensure your changes pass existing unit tests to prove your reliability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the unit tests for this fix and ensure 100% coverage on the affected code paths.

steps.title: Document and Package for Social Proof
steps.description: Create a high-impact pull request description that highlights the business value of your fix. This is your portfolio entry.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a professional PR summary that explains the problem, the architectural impact of the fix, and the performance improvements achieved.

pro_tips: Always focus on 'Performance-First' fixes; stakeholders value speed optimizations significantly more than aesthetic changes.
Use AI to generate documentation for your PRs that explains the 'Why' behind the architecture, not just the 'What'.
Target repositories with a high number of closed issues; it proves the project is active and your contribution will be seen by peers.
Treat your GitHub commit history as a product; curate your commits to show a logical, iterative progression of thought.
Never blindly accept AI output; always add a custom comment block explaining your manual review process to show you are the lead engineer.
content.next_steps: Once you have merged three significant PRs, package these into a 'Case Study' on your website that links directly to the PRs, showcasing the business impact of your technical interventions.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to turn code into currency. Stop building in silence and start shipping to scale. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
